title: Dundalk、Louth — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Dundalk、Louthの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

DundalkはLouthにある人口41,000の都市です。A border town in northeastern Ireland, known for its historic castle, the Carroll’s Village shopping center, and a growing pharmaceutical and engineering sector.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
